record.field: This is the primary unrestricted equity account. In QuickBooks, this is automatically maintained and cannot be deleted.
Used in the Year-End Closing Accounts method (preferred) per Appendix J.
Used in the Year-End Closing Accounts method (preferred) per Appendix J.
Expense recorded when the lodge covers part of a member's dues or fees via the "Lodge Assisted" flag on a dues payment line.
Liability offset for approved deferred-maintenance items awaiting completion (used by elksmaintenance module).
